title: Apply to join phase 1 of the national rollout of free breakfast clubs
body: " This online application will close at 11.59pm on Friday 5 December 2025.   Check your eligibility to apply  Schools with 40% or more pupils eligible for free school meals (FSM), or the most disadvantaged school in an area, whichever is lower, are eligible to apply to join phase 1 of the national rollout starting in April 2026.  Selection  When selecting successful schools, we will consider:   levels of disadvantage current participation in the National School Breakfast Programme geographical spread   Schools will find out if their application has been successful by mid-January 2026.  Schools currently taking part in the early adopter scheme will automatically be transferred over to the first wave of national rollout.  Guidance on the role of schools and trusts in setting up and running free breakfast clubs is available. "

taxons.title: School food, accommodation, transport and uniform
